purpose: Pure-data schema, manifest-to-Chakra transform, font-union, contrast-math, and per-surface treatment catalog modules under app/src/themes/ — the module layer that S2-S4 fill in with real manifests, a generated registry, and consumer wiring. S1 itself wires nothing into any existing consumer; app/src/themes/index.ts is a deliberate no-op pass-through to app/src/lib/theme.ts so the public API surface (AC-STRUCT-5) and all six existing consumers are unaffected.

public_api.name: ThemeManifestSchema
public_api.description: Strict zod schema for the full ThemeManifest shape; rejects unexpected/extra top-level and nested keys.

public_api.name: ThemeManifest
public_api.description: Inferred manifest type; the ThemeManifest seam contract consumed by S2 (manifests), buildChakraTheme, fontUnion, contrast.

public_api.name: validateManifest
public_api.description: Parses and throws (ZodError) on any invalid/missing/extra field; never returns a partially-valid object.

public_api.name: createScale
public_api.description: Lifted unchanged from theme.ts:71; expands a 10-value hex tuple into Chakra's step-keyed color-scale shape.

public_api.name: ThemeOverride
public_api.signature: type ThemeOverride = { colors; semanticTokens; fonts; fontSizes?; radii?; styles; config; components }
public_api.description: The ThemeOverride seam contract type — the object handed to extendTheme.

public_api.name: getChakraTheme (buildChakraTheme.ts)
public_api.description: extendTheme(buildThemeOverride(manifest)), cached by manifest.id for referential stability. Manifest-keyed (not id/registry-keyed) — see design note below.

public_api.name: buildFontLinkHref
public_api.description: Google Fonts CSS2 <link> href builder per spec.md §6.5's axis-encoding rules.

public_api.name: FontLoad
public_api.signature: type FontLoad = { family: string; weights?: number[]; ital?: boolean; subset?: string }

public_api.name: wcagRatio
public_api.description: WCAG relative-luminance contrast ratio between two hex colors (app/src/themes/contrast.ts).

public_api.name: evaluateThemeContrast
public_api.signature: evaluateThemeContrast(manifest: ThemeManifest): { pass: boolean; failures: ContrastFailure[] }
public_api.description: Evaluates spec.md §6.7's pair table against real hex values; appBg pairs required only when contentSurface is falsy.

public_api.name: CARD_ELEVATION / BUTTON_ELEVATION / NAV_ELEVATION / CONTENT_PANEL_STYLES
public_api.description: app/src/themes/treatments/elevation.ts — per-surface elevation and content-panel BoxProps catalogs.

public_api.name: ICON_SETS / resolveIconId
public_api.signature: Record<string, Record<IconSetName, string>> / resolveIconId(name, iconSet): string
public_api.description: app/src/themes/treatments/iconSets.ts — icon-name -> iconify-id maps per icon set.

public_api.name: SURFACE_PATTERNS / APP_BG_GRADIENTS
public_api.description: app/src/themes/treatments/patterns.ts — surface pattern BoxProps + reference appBg gradient strings.

public_api.name: themes/index.ts re-exports
public_api.signature: APP_THEMES, DEFAULT_THEME_NAME, isAppThemeName, normalizeThemeName, getThemeDefinition, getChakraTheme, AppThemeName (type), AppThemeDefinition (type), ThemeVisualStyle (type)
public_api.description: S1: pure pass-through re-export of app/src/lib/theme.ts's existing public API — no registry import, no behavior change.

owned_data: the ThemeManifest shape and its validation (schema.ts)
font dedup + Google Fonts URL construction (fontUnion.ts)
dependencies_allowed: @chakra-ui/react (extendTheme + ThemeConfig type in buildChakraTheme.ts; BoxProps type only in treatments/elevation.ts and treatments/patterns.ts)
app/src/lib/theme.ts (index.ts only, value + type re-export — S1's pass-through)
app/src/types (index.ts only, type re-export of AppThemeName)
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/themes/registry.generated.ts (does not exist until S2; buildChakraTheme.ts and index.ts must not depend on it in S1)
any app/src/themes/<id>/manifest.ts (do not exist until S2)
any runtime import of schema.ts from a module other than schema.ts itself (AC-BOUND-1 zod boundary; fontUnion.ts, contrast.ts, treatments/*, index.ts, buildChakraTheme.ts all use `import type` only)
design_notes: getChakraTheme signature (flagged as an open structural question in the story brief): architecture.md's Boundary Rules grant buildChakraTheme.ts only an edge to @chakra-ui/react and treatments/* — no edge to registry.generated.ts, which does not exist yet at S1 regardless. So buildChakraTheme.ts's getChakraTheme is keyed by a full ThemeManifest (cached by manifest.id), not by an AppThemeName id resolved against a registry. index.ts IS allowed to depend on both registry.generated and buildChakraTheme (per the Boundary Rules table), so the id -> manifest -> getChakraTheme(manifest) composition is wired there once the registry exists (S2+). This resolves the ambiguity without escalation: the no-op pass-through index.ts and a working, registry-agnostic getChakraTheme coexist cleanly because the manifest-keyed signature never required the registry in the first place.

ContentPanelName is not called out as its own file in architecture.md's per-file list; it is colocated in treatments/elevation.ts (CONTENT_PANEL_STYLES) since it is, like elevation, a small BoxProps catalog keyed by a content-panel treatment name, and useThemeStyles.ts's pre-refactor contentPanel() switch lived alongside cardOverlay/buttonOverlay/navOverlay in the same file. Only one named variant ('panel') exists today, mirroring the pre-refactor code's single non-empty case (pixel/minecraft).

ElevationName's five values map onto the pre-refactor visualStyle switch as: soft(calm)->flat, rounded(playful)->softDrop, toy(lego)->hardDrop, pixel(minecraft)->pixelBevel, floral(flower)->floralGlow. flat and softDrop both currently resolve to an empty BoxProps ({}), preserving byte-identical output for calm/playful while reserving two distinct names for future themes that may want to diverge from 'no elevation' in different ways.

treatments/patterns.ts's APP_BG_GRADIENTS exports the three pre-refactor per-theme backgroundImage gradient strings (lego/minecraft/flower) verbatim, per architecture.md's Module Map entry for this file ('surface/background patterns + appBg gradients'). Since manifests may only import the ThemeManifest type (not treatments/*), these are documentation/reference constants, not a runtime dependency edge — S2's manifests will inline the same literal string into colors.backgroundImage rather than import this export.

RawOverrides (treatments.overrides) is validated permissively in schema.ts as z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()) per surface (card/button/nav/surface) rather than typed against Chakra's BoxProps, since zod cannot meaningfully validate arbitrary Chakra style-prop shapes; the authoring guide (S5) documents this escape hatch's stated limits per spec.md §3.
